[cron:b8b184ac-d733-4a46-a6f3-dbe3877d1496 daily-openclaw-git-backup] Run the script `C:\Users\Gustavo\.openclaw\workspace\scripts\daily-backup-to-branch.cmd` on the host. It should perform a brute-force git backup of `C:\Users\Gustavo\.openclaw` to branch `backup`. After running it, report success or the exact failure in one short message. Do not modify the script unless execution fails and the fix is obvious.
Current time: Tuesday, March 31st, 2026 — 10:30 PM (America/Bogota) / 2026-04-01 03:30 UTC

Return your summary as plain text; it will be delivered automatically. If the task explicitly calls for messaging a specific external recipient, note who/where it should go instead of sending it yourself.
